title: Brand family
lede: Four distinct sub-brands share the KIMES exhibition foundation. KIMES and MedicomteK form the medical-equipment family — both carry the signature slash-cut i. Beauty&Derma and INSPIRE Digital Health are stand-alone event identities with their own visual systems.

brands.name: KIMES
brands.desc: Korea International Medical & Hospital Equipment Show — the flagship exhibition brand.

brands.name: MedicomteK
brands.desc: Sister exhibition focused on medical communication technology and connected devices.

brands.name: Beauty&Derma
brands.desc: Aesthetic medicine and dermatology event line, held in Seoul and Busan editions.

brands.name: INSPIRE Digital Health
brands.desc: Forward-looking conference exploring digital health innovation. Tagline: HEALTH MEETS INNOVATION.
